steps: Go to https://console.mistral.ai and create an account (or log in)
Complete workspace setup and add a payment method (required to activate API access)
In the left sidebar, click 'API Keys'
Enter a name and optionally set an expiration date
Click 'Create' and immediately copy the displayed key — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Mistral AI secret API key

notes: A payment method must be added before API keys can be activated
The API key is shown only once — copy it immediately after creation
Free trial credits may be available for new accounts
The key is sent in the Authorization header as 'Bearer <your_key>'
Mistral offers both open-weight and commercial models; pricing varies per model

test_endpoint.description: List available models to verify credentials
